texts.facebook:
Nobody on an ML team will ever ask where your PhD is.

They'll ask what you've built. Whether you can look at messy data and find the story in it. Whether your model survives contact with production.

All of that is learnable by doing — and none of it requires a degree. Most working ML engineers picked it up exactly that way: one real task at a time.

That's how ML Career Simulator works: you get "hired" as a Junior at a fictional company and grow to Middle through 20 real business cases. The first 2 modules are free, no card required:
https://ml-simulator-app-production.up.railway.app/en.html?utm_source=facebook&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=organic&utm_content=2026-07-18-audience-nophd

#machinelearning #mlengineer #careerchange #learntocode #datascience #techcareer #ml

card.headline: You can start ML from where you are
